<!-- A clear and concise description of the bug. -->

## Reproduction

<!-- Minimal zsh script that reproduces the issue. The shorter the better. -->

```zsh
#!/usr/bin/env zsh
source ./zlog

# steps to reproduce
```

<!-- What you expected to happen. -->

<!-- What actually happened. Include full output / error messages. -->

| Field        | Value                                              |
